summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or low-signal cleanup path is available under this job's gates.

actions.reason: Useful contributor feature PR with proof and broad review surface; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or treat as part of this inventory shard.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR with useful code but dirty merge state and unresolved review path; keep open, do not close or merge from this job.
Useful ACP bug-fix PR, but proof gate is still failing and no fix or merge action is allowed; keep it open independently.
Useful contributor bug-fix PR with active proof/check blockers; keep open independently rather than close or escalate the whole shard.
Useful diagnostic feature PR, but it has an unresolved review defect and failed proof gate; keep open independently for contributor or maintainer follow-up.
